title: Intelligent Insurance Analytics Dashboard
description: AI-powered analytics platform surfacing business insights from millions of records for a major SA insurer.
details: Architected and delivered a distributed analytics platform for a major South African insurance company, processing millions of records to surface key business insights. Implemented AI-powered anomaly detection, automated trend analysis, and executive reporting dashboards on distributed backend services, Snowflake, and cloud-native APIs.

title: Predictive Maintenance Platform
description: Near real-time telemetry and predictive maintenance platform for 160+ industrial assets.
details: Architected near real-time telemetry and predictive maintenance platforms processing operational data from 160+ industrial assets across 10+ integrated systems using event-driven architecture, Kafka, Snowflake, and cloud-native backend services. Built AI-powered RAG and agentic workflows (LangGraph, MCP tooling, vector retrieval) to generate maintenance diagnostics, repair recommendations, and automated fleet health summaries from OEM documentation and live operational telemetry.

title: Cryptography Platform
description: High-performance cryptography platform underpinning a bank's logins, clearing house keys, and PIN operations.
details: Maintained and improved a high-performance cryptography platform underpinning client logins and SOS, the bank's keys to the clearing house, all PIN operations, and bulk card printing. Ensured low-latency, highly reliable cryptographic services under heavy transactional load, integrating with HSMs (PayShield, Luna) for secure key management.

title: Token Management Platform
description: Token issuance, rotation, and revocation workflows for secure card data handling.
details: Built token issuance, rotation, and revocation workflows integrating with HSM cryptographic infrastructure. Ensured compliance with payment security standards for secure handling of sensitive card data.

title: Payment Modernisation
description: Stabilized and optimized the new payment engine.
details: Helped stabilize the newly introduced payment engine by refining logic, improving performance, and adding functionality to support operational processes. Improved transaction reliability and scalability across core payment systems, and optimised processing flows to reduce end-to-end latency — improving throughput during peak load events including Black Friday.

title: 3D Secure Service Optimization
description: Improved the efficiency and resilience of the bank's 3D Secure service.
details: Replaced synchronous polling with event-driven architecture, improving authentication responsiveness and reducing system load during peak transaction periods such as Black Friday and Cyber Monday. Strengthened observability by improving logging and dashboards, enabling faster issue detection and resolution — a pattern later adopted across multiple payment services.

title: Secure PIN Change Kiosk
description: Modernized and deployed a secure card PIN change kiosk and API solution.
details: Built a full-stack PIN change kiosk application (Angular front end, C#/.NET back end) enabling clients to securely change and verify card PINs, integrating directly with HSM infrastructure (PayShield, Luna) for cryptographic PIN operations. Designed with end-to-end encryption and a security-first architecture, ensuring sensitive PIN data was never exposed in transit or at rest, and remained compliant with payment security standards. Deployed across South African offices.

title: Personal Portfolio Website
details: Developed a dynamic personal website to showcase professional experience, personal projects, and technical skills. Built using Next.js and deployed via a GitHub Actions pipeline, the site features animated project cards, interactive filters, and a responsive design. Integrated Framer Motion for animations and Tailwind CSS for styling.

title: Property Management & Tenant Tool
description: Designed and developed tools to manage and scale a property portfolio.
details: Built tools to streamline property acquisition, tenant vetting, acquisition, and management. Initiated a tenant management tool integrating WhatsApp for real-time communication and support. Oversaw the rental of multiple units while optimizing tenant interactions and property operations. The system allows scalable property management and improved responsiveness to tenant needs.
